title: goeppertia portobelensis
side_effects: Goeppertia portobelensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea and vomiting, due to the high concentration of essential oils in its leaves. Ingesting large quantities of the plant's leaves can lead to liver damage and stomach ulcers. Skin irritation and allergic reactions are also possible if the sap from the plant's leaves comes into contact with sensitive skin. Additionally, improper use of Goeppertia portobelensis can interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners, and exacerbate underlying health conditions.
